columns.name: GMLFKNR
columns.description: The original product number being replaced or complemented.

columns.name: NYTTFKNR
columns.description: The new product number replacing or complementing the original product.

columns.name: ANTALL
columns.description: The quantity of products involved in the replacement or complementation process.

columns.name: TYPE
columns.description: Indicates whether the record represents a replacement (erstattet) or a complement (erstatter).

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: The unique identifier of the user performing the replacement or complementation action.

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp indicating when the replacement or complementation was performed.
